prompt: Add a drag-and-drop reorder function to the KanbanColumn component that updates task positions in the store

turns.content:
<task>
Add a drag-and-drop reorder function to the KanbanColumn component that updates task positions in the store
</task>

src/
  components/
    KanbanBoard.tsx
    KanbanColumn.tsx
    TaskCard.tsx
  store/
    taskStore.ts
    types.ts
  App.tsx
  index.tsx

arguments.reasoning:
I need to:
1. Add a reorderTasks action to the store that takes a column status, source index, and destination index, then recalculates positions
2. Add drag event handlers to KanbanColumn that track drag source/destination
3. Use HTML5 drag and drop API (onDragStart, onDragOver, onDrop)

Let me do this incrementally:
- First: add reorderTasks to the store
- Second: add drag handlers to KanbanColumn
- Third: verify with type checking

arguments.summary: Read KanbanColumn component, taskStore, and types. Column sorts tasks by position. Store has CRUD but no reorder action. Need to add reorderTasks to store, then add drag/drop handlers to column.

next_steps.description: Add reorderTasks(status, fromIndex, toIndex) action to taskStore that filters tasks by status, reorders, and recalculates position values
Add drag event handlers to KanbanColumn: onDragStart sets dragged task id, onDragOver prevents default, onDrop calculates new index and calls reorderTasks
Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify types are correct

turns.content: Added content after line 27 in src/store/taskStore.ts

arguments.summary: Added reorderTasks action to taskStore that splices and reorders tasks within a column. Updated KanbanColumn with HTML5 drag/drop handlers using useRef for drag tracking. TypeScript compilation passes with no errors.
arguments.final_answer:
Added drag-and-drop reorder to KanbanColumn:
- New reorderTasks(status, fromIndex, toIndex) in taskStore filters tasks by column, splices, recalculates positions
- KanbanColumn uses useRef to track drag source, onDragStart/onDragOver/onDrop handlers
- Tasks wrapped in draggable divs with drop targets
- TypeScript compiles cleanly
